geopolitics.title: Ten-day Israel-Lebanon ceasefire may be extended by mutual agreement, US says
geopolitics.description: April 16 (Reuters) - Israel and Lebanon will implement a 10-day ceasefire beginning 5 pm EST (2100 GMT) on Thursday to enable negotiations toward a permanent security and peace agreement, the U.S. State Department said, adding that the ceasefire period may be extended by mutual agreement.
